summary: Closed out ADR 0336 on the exact-main tree by archiving ws-0336 as merged history, regenerating the shard-backed compatibility registry plus the coordination diagram, refreshing canonical-truth history surfaces, and preserving both the successful promotion gate and the runner-specific remote-validate ansible-syntax timeout as explicit evidence instead of hidden operator knowledge.

verification.observed: The branch-local receipt `2026-04-04-adr-0336-public-entrypoint-leakage-live-apply` already proved the validator, focused tests, repo validation, and promotion-facing gate on top of `origin/main@20a66bbf088d1aa456d34f173fd8e2c8664f4c20`.

The final closeout moved `ws-0336` from `workstreams/active/` into `workstreams/archive/2026/`, regenerated `workstreams.yaml`, regenerated `docs/diagrams/agent-coordination-map.excalidraw`, and refreshed canonical truth so `README.md` no longer expected the workstream as active.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards generated-docs`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, and `git diff --check` all passed on the archived exact-main tree; `agent-standards` emitted only the expected ADR 0167 warning that the feature branch is no longer present in the active registry.
`make pre-push-gate` passed before the archive move with every selected blocking lane green, establishing that the exact-main validation surface was healthy before the terminal-history closeout.

`make remote-validate` reported `remote command failed, falling back locally`; all selected fallback lanes passed except `ansible-syntax`, which timed out after `902.79s`. The timeout is preserved as runner evidence and did not reproduce in the successful `make pre-push-gate` lane set.

notes: This mainline receipt records the terminal archive state for ws-0336 without bumping `VERSION` or editing `versions/stack.yaml`, because ADR 0336 is repository-only and was already implemented before this closeout branch.

Local `main` was intentionally left untouched because another worktree owned a dirty `main` checkout with unrelated ADR 0337 work in progress; the verified integration commit is pushed directly to `origin/main` to avoid overwriting that local state.
